title: Section 9
content: An Appellate Tribunal shall consist of one person only (hereinafter referred to as 1[the Chairperson of the Appellate Tribunal]) to be appointed, by notification, by the Central Government.
footnote: 1 . Subs. by s. 2, ibid., for "the Presiding Officer of the Appellate Tribunal" (w.e.f. 17-1-2000).
